'''Flat Cap''' is a dyable equipable accessory that makes your dog look stylish.{{Item
| image = Flatcap.png
| id = flat_cap
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| [[Training Treat]]<br>+ Wool Carpet
| [[File:Flat_cap_crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}

== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.18.5.
